Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Use ''subs'' type parameter for subscription product fetching

expo-iap''s fetchProducts defaults to ''in-app'' purchases. Must specify
type: ''subs'' to fetch subscription products from App Store Connect.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Map IAP products to ''premium'' plan instead of ''monthly''

The seed script creates ''free'' and ''premium'' plans, but receipt
validation was looking for ''monthly''. All IAP products now map to
the ''premium'' plan, with billing_period used for expiry calculation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "fix: Remove unused percentage param from Pie chart label")

Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "fix: Handle Stripe customer not found when switching test to live mode

When switching from Stripe test mode to live mode, existing customer IDs
become invalid. Now we verify the customer exists before using it, and
create a new customer if the old one is not found.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "debug: Add logging to Sidebar admin check")

Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "fix: Add is_admin to OAuth responses and fix Sidebar auth check

Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "chore: Bump version to 0.1.6 for App Store submission")

Bash(git -C "c:/Users/gwiza/Desktop/Dev/tarantuverse" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Hide Stack header on Species tab to remove dead space

The Species tab had duplicate headers causing dead black space - 
both the Expo Router Stack header and a custom internal header.
Hide the Stack header since the component provides its own styled one.
